title: Volunteer Opportunities * Child Abuse Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Volunteer Opportunities * Child Abuse Issues 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Autism Spectrum Disorder Child Abuse Issues Disaster/Emergency Issues Domestic Violence Issues Foster Children Homelessness Issues Seasonal Workers Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BIKERS AGAINST CHILD ABUSE B.A.C.A. OF OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports children at court, parole hearings or attending case interviews by trained biker volunteers. Volunteer opportunities are available. Eligibility: Ages 3-18 with a reported incident of sexually, physical, or emotional child abuse Volunteers: Age 18 and older, with regular access to a motorcycle, and the ability to pass a complete background check. Additional requirements may vary on level of participation. Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 259-8618 Visit Website More Details THE HEALING CIRCLE INC VOCA CAMPS VOLUNTEER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF For community members interested in becoming volunteers at annual camps, an overnight or mentoring program for children who are survivors of sexual abuse. 1054 Exchange Street Suite A Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Age 18 and older who can complete volunteer training and background check. Must be a high school graduate. Hours: Volunteer hours vary Email (503) 468-2844 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE HEALING CIRCLE INC VOCA CAMPS VOLUNTEER
